name: BBC News
description: UK public broadcaster. Generally factual, mild centre-left lean on social issues.

name: Fox News
description: US cable network. Strong right-leaning, high opinion-to-fact ratio in prime time.

name: CNN
description: US cable network. Left-leaning framing, higher sensationalism in headlines.

name: Reuters
description: Wire service. Consistently factual, neutral political framing, low sensationalism.

name: New York Times
description: US broadsheet. High factual standards, mild progressive lean in editorial choices.

name: The Hindu
description: Indian broadsheet. Generally factual, mild left-liberal lean, low sensationalism.

name: NDTV
description: Indian TV news. Opposition-leaning framing, moderate sensationalism.

name: Times of India
description: India's largest English daily. Centrist-right, known for clickbait headlines.
